criteria.name: feedback timing has no leakage violations
current and last-sign shortcuts are ambiguous
current reflex does not solve predictive tasks
criteria.note: A predictive task cannot be solvable from the current sensory value alone.

criteria.name: sign persistence does not solve predictive tasks
criteria.note: A predictive task cannot collapse to last nonzero sign memory.

criteria.name: causal predictive memory solves tasks
criteria.note: Proves the streams are solvable when the necessary predictive state is available.

criteria.name: predictive memory beats best reflex shortcut
wrong/shuffled target controls fail
criteria.note: Prediction must depend on the correct binding/horizon rather than target leakage or generic rehearsal.

criteria.name: predictive memory beats best wrong/shuffled sham

tier_summary.claim_boundary: Task-validation evidence only; it proves predictive pressure, not CRA predictive coding or world modeling.

summary.claim_boundary: Task-validation evidence only; it proves predictive pressure, not CRA predictive coding or world modeling.
